notes: Threshold profiles for staged rollout of kernel-vuln rule quality gates.

seed_baseline.description: Current seed-rule baseline from real-data line benchmark. Use only for bootstrap gating while expanding recall.

phase2_target.description: Near-term semantic expansion target. Requires improved dataflow/AST and subsystem-specific rules.

phase3_target.description: Mature gate target intended after iterative rule tuning and false-positive controls.
